# Next.js Optimizer Suite

Next.js Optimizer Suite is a high-performance analytics, caching, and health-monitoring platform designed exclusively for Next.js applications (App Router).

## Features
- Dynamic Cache Revalidation API
- System Health Monitoring
- Automated SEO checks
- Role-based Access Control (Admin vs Viewer)

## Technologies Used
- Next.js 14+ (React)
- Tailwind CSS
- Prisma ORM
- PostgreSQL (Supabase)

## Author
Built by MD MUSTAK TAHSIN ABIR.
Website: https://nextjs-optimizer-suite.vercel.app
